history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person wearing a black hoodie with a white graphic design and black shorts leans against a black railing on a modern, dark staircase. The railing is decorated with white fabric streamers and artificial green vines with some small purple flowers. The staircase itself is black with white illuminated strips along the edges of each step, creating a dramatic, almost futuristic ambiance. The person is holding a white smartphone in their right hand and looking down at it. They are wearing high-top sneakers that are black, white, and gold. The background is dark and features vertical white light strips, adding to the contemporary and slightly edgy atmosphere. The lighting is dramatic, with the white light strips providing the primary illumination, casting subtle shadows. The color palette is dominated by black and white, with accents of gold on the sneakers and small touches of purple and green from the decorations. The overall mood is one of urban cool, introspection, and modern style. --ar 16:9 --style raw
